title: Worksheet with form controls
author: ayanth
body:
Hello,

I have a Excel workbook template that has a bunch of formulas bound to a Drop down list. I load it using `workbook.xlsx.readFile`, play with the data bound to the formulas, but when I do save using `workbook.xlsx.writeFile`; the drop down list isn't there anymore, so all formulas break.

Does this tool supports form controls? I haven't seen it anywhere in the documentation nor on the issues.

-Thank you

comments.author: Siemienik
comments.body: @ayanth could I please You to upload example file?

comments.author: ayanth
Siemienik
comments.body:
@ayanth probably no  - I am not really sure about that - I've never used form controls, so any example file will be useful.

I had similar issues with media types: #702 #731 there was a bug inside reader and writer

comments.author: trucbinh
comments.body: @Siemienik I added checkbox from form controls into excel, then read this file using exceljs and exported back. The checkbox disappeared. Does exceljs support "form controls" now? Is there any workaround for this?

comments.author: ftoh
comments.body:
> @ayanth could I please You to upload example file?

[Book with FormControls.xlsx](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/17914373/Book.with.FormControls.xlsx)
